headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Fortive, Raises Price Target to $58
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Chris Snyder   maintains Fortive (NYSE:FTV) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $53 to $58.
